docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER COPELAND, TOMMIE
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-31-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER TOMMIE COPELAND'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 4, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS MOVING PAPERS BY FEBRUARY 4, 2013. PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER CONFIRMING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,849.58 INTEREST, $25.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF COPELAND, TOMMIE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF OF PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER COPELAND, TOMMIE SERVED DEC-26-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO RESPONDENT ABSOLUTELYNEW, INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-04-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD (GRANTED)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER TOMMIE COPELAND'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER COPELAND, TOMMIE RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ABSOLUTELYNEW, INC. $23,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $5,625.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arb Award
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER TOMMIE COPELAND'S Notice of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arb Award
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Continued To Mar-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER TOMMIE COPELAND's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is continued to March 4, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of its moving papers by February 4, 2013. Please attach a cover letter confirming the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
